goal: (1) On OUR-OWN surfaces, swap the widget's redundant self-link ('Free tarot reading by MeowTarot' -> home) for a distribution CTA that drives site owners to embed it; (2) ship a WordPress plugin so the widget is one-click installable (link-building distribution).
done: (1) Added ?promo=1 to widget.html (+/th/): when set, the powered-by becomes 'Get your own free tarot widget ->' / 'รับวิดเจ็ตทาโรต์ฟรีไปใส่เว็บคุณ ->' linking to /embed.html (UTM getwidget). Default (external embeds) KEEPS the do-follow 'Free tarot reading by MeowTarot' backlink — the SEO point — unchanged. embed.html (+/th/) preview iframe now loads ?promo=1; the COPY-PASTE snippet still emits widget.html WITHOUT promo (backlink preserved). (2) New WordPress plugin integrations/wordpress/meowtarot-tarot-widget/: shortcode [meowtarot_tarot spread=one|three lang=auto|en|th height=] + dynamic Gutenberg block (ServerSideRender, no build step) that both render a lazy iframe to widget.html (UTM wpplugin) plus the do-follow attribution backlink; readme.txt for WordPress.org; zip built to ~/Downloads/meowtarot-tarot-widget.zip.
verified: widget.html?promo=1 in headless Chrome -> powered-by = 'Get your own free tarot widget ->' to /embed.html; embed snippet (widgetUrl) confirmed still WITHOUT promo (backlink intact); block.js node --check OK; zip contains folder-at-root + 3 files. PHP not lintable locally (no php); to be runtime-verified in WP Playground / LocalWP.
